description: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support platform that provides ticketing, knowledge base, community forums, and automation tools to help businesses manage customer interactions efficiently.
authentication: API Key (Basic Auth with API key as username) and OAuth 2.0
self_serve: Yes – includes knowledge base, community forums, and customer portal
api_surface: Extensive REST API covering tickets, contacts, companies, groups, users, etc., with pagination, filtering, and webhooks
mcp: Yes – Freshdesk Marketplace offers pre-built integrations and apps
buildability: High – offers comprehensive API, SDKs, webhooks, and marketplace for building custom integrations
main_blocker: Rate limiting of 1000 requests per hour per API key can hinder high-volume integrations
